workflow.title: High-risk AI SaaS supplier compliance review
workflow.reviewerNarrative: A reviewer evaluates a critical AI SaaS supplier that touches personal data, Azure AD, ServiceNow, and finance reporting with missing DPA, model-training, and continuity evidence.
workflow.productionPromise: The agent must produce a defensible no-approval-yet decision with cited domains, named gaps, controls, trace, audit record, and human approval boundary.

stages.label: Structured intake
stages.proof: case_id, business_unit, geography, supplier, integrations, supplied evidence summary

stages.label: Evidence review
stages.proof: detected available SOC 2 summary and missing DPA/model-training/continuity evidence

stages.label: Compliance domain scan
stages.proof: privacy, AI governance, continuity, third-party, technical, finance, and Microsoft governance domains

stages.label: Gap challenge
stages.proof: high-severity DPA, model-training, and continuity blockers plus finance/project confirmation

stages.label: Responsible AI review
stages.proof: human approval required, no automatic approval, unsupported certainty blocked

stages.label: Audit pack
stages.proof: decision, evidence IDs, gaps, controls, and trace events exported as JSON

acceptanceCriteria: at least three high-severity gaps are named
privacy, AI governance, and business continuity domains are applicable
outputReview includes human_approval_required and no_automatic_approval checks
trace contains intake, domain scan, evidence mapping, control recommendation, and output review events
stretchCriteria: same case can run through CrewAI Flow with deterministic fallback
uploaded contract evidence can flip individual gaps from blocking to satisfied
trace can be graded by an eval suite and exported using OpenTelemetry GenAI conventions
reviewer can approve, reject, or request remediation with RBAC-backed audit

input.serviceDescription: Critical AI workflow automation service for finance reporting and operational analytics.
input.brief: Procure a critical AI SaaS supplier that processes personal data, integrates with Azure AD and ServiceNow, and supports finance reporting across the UAE.

documents.title: Supplier assurance summary
documents.summary: SOC 2 summary available. No signed DPA, model-training exclusion, or continuity plan attached.

decision.rationale: Multiple high-severity evidence or applicability gaps remain open.

agents.goal: Convert a messy enterprise request into a bounded compliance work plan with review checkpoints.
Identify likely policies, regulations, standards, and internal obligations from the case context.
Inspect supplied evidence summaries, document signals, and missing artifacts.
Translate obligations and evidence gaps into controls, blockers, owners, and remediation actions.
Check the proposed output for unsupported certainty, bias-sensitive assumptions, unsafe automation, and missing human approval.
Produce an audit-ready decision brief with trace, evidence IDs, gaps, controls, and escalation path.

tasks.expected_output: JSON with case_summary, review_domains, assumptions, and missing_intake_fields.
JSON with obligations, applicability_status, evidence_required, and domain_owner.
JSON with supported_claims, evidence_ids, missing_evidence, and confidence_notes.
JSON with controls, blocking_gaps, non_blocking_gaps, owners, and remediation_plan.
JSON with responsible_ai_checks, required_corrections, and final_output_safe_for_human_review.
JSON decision brief suitable for human approval and audit review.

stages.expected_output: JSON with case_summary, review_domains, assumptions, and missing_intake_fields.
JSON with obligations, applicability_status, evidence_required, and domain_owner.
JSON with supported_claims, evidence_ids, missing_evidence, and confidence_notes.
JSON with controls, blocking_gaps, non_blocking_gaps, owners, and remediation_plan.
JSON with responsible_ai_checks, required_corrections, and final_output_safe_for_human_review.
JSON decision brief suitable for human approval and audit review.

caveat: Curated from the golden demo evidence snapshot; raw full run remains in evidence/golden-demo-run.json.
